nodes.label: Varnamala (वर्णमाला)
nodes.description: The Hindi Alphabet - the complete set of letters used in Hindi

nodes.label: Swar (स्वर)
nodes.description: Vowels - 11 letters that can be spoken on their own: अ आ इ ई उ ऊ ऋ ए ऐ ओ औ

nodes.label: Hrasva Swar (ह्रस्व स्वर)
nodes.description: Short vowels: अ, इ, उ, ऋ - take less time to say

nodes.label: Deergha Swar (दीर्घ स्वर)
nodes.description: Long vowels: आ, ई, ऊ, ए, ऐ, ओ, औ - take more time to say

nodes.label: Matra (मात्रा)
nodes.description: Vowel signs that attach to consonants: ा ि ी ु ू े ै ो ौ

nodes.label: Vyanjan (व्यंजन)
nodes.description: Consonants - 33 letters that need a vowel to be spoken: क to ह

nodes.label: Ka-Varg (क वर्ग)
nodes.description: Throat sounds: क, ख, ग, घ, ङ

nodes.label: Cha-Varg (च वर्ग)
nodes.description: Palate sounds: च, छ, ज, झ, ञ

nodes.label: Ta-Varg (ट वर्ग)
nodes.description: Retroflex tongue-tip sounds: ट, ठ, ड, ढ, ण

nodes.label: Ta-Varg (त वर्ग)
nodes.description: Dental teeth sounds: त, थ, द, ध, न

nodes.label: Pa-Varg (प वर्ग)
nodes.description: Lip sounds: प, फ, ब, भ, म

nodes.label: Antastha Vyanjan
nodes.description: Semi-vowel consonants: य, र, ल, व

nodes.label: Ushma Vyanjan
nodes.description: Sibilant/fricative consonants: श, ष, स, ह

nodes.label: Devanagari Lipi
nodes.description: Hindi is written in the Devanagari script, from left to right with a line (Shirorekha) on top
